title: Boryangraecum pumilio
taxonomy: Boryangraecum pumilio is classified as an epiphytic orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a species of orchid that is native to Madagascar. The genus Boryangraecum is a small grouping of orchid species, and Boryangraecum pumilio is one of the species within this group. The classification of this species is further detailed in the field of botany, where it is recognized by its unique characteristics and growth habits. In the APG III classification system, Boryangraecum pumilio is placed within the subfamily Epidendroideae.
